title: Admin Dashboard Phase 1: User Assessment Data Table, Stats Cards, and CSV Export

requirements.text: Create a User Assessment Data Table component that displays all wellness reports from backend with columns: Name, Assessment Date, Total Score (0-160), Section-wise breakdown (Sleep, Gut, Movement, Mind scores), WhatsApp Number, and Email (if provided)

quotes: User Assessment Data Table with search, filter, sorting, and pagination

acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all stored wellness reports from backend
Shows user name, assessment date, total score out of 160
Displays individual section scores with bilingual labels
Shows contact information (WhatsApp number and email)
Table is responsive and works on mobile devices

requirements.text: Add search functionality to the User Assessment Data Table that filters by user name in real-time

quotes: Search & Filter: Name, date range, score range से filter करें

acceptanceCriteria: Search input field is prominently displayed above the table
Filters table rows as user types (debounced)
Case-insensitive search across user names
Shows empty state message when no results match

requirements.text: Implement date range and score range filters for the User Assessment Data Table

quotes: Search & Filter: Name, date range, score range से filter करें

acceptanceCriteria: Date range picker allows filtering by assessment date (from/to dates)
Score range filter allows minimum and maximum total score inputs
Filters can be combined with search functionality
Clear filters button resets all active filters

requirements.text: Add column sorting to the User Assessment Data Table with clickable column headers for Name, Assessment Date, Total Score, and individual section scores

quotes: Sorting: Columns पर click करके sort करें (score highest to lowest, date newest to oldest)

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking column header toggles between ascending and descending sort
Visual indicators (arrows) show current sort direction
Default sort is by Assessment Date (newest to oldest)
Maintains current filters when sorting is applied

requirements.text: Implement pagination for the User Assessment Data Table with 10-20 entries per page and page navigation controls
acceptanceCriteria: Pagination controls show current page and total pages
User can navigate to next/previous page
User can select page size (10, 20 entries per page)
Pagination state persists across filter/sort operations
Shows total number of filtered results

requirements.text: Create Quick Stats Cards section displaying: Total Assessments Completed, Average Score (overall), Users Needing Immediate Attention (Alert status), and Recent Submissions (last 7 days)

quotes: Quick Stats Cards showing total assessments, average score, alert users, and recent submissions

acceptanceCriteria: Four stat cards displayed prominently at top of dashboard
Total Assessments shows count of all wellness reports
Average Score calculates mean total score across all assessments
Alert Users counts reports with total score below alert threshold (defined in constants.ts)
Recent Submissions counts assessments from last 7 days
Cards use visually distinct icons and colors
Stats update automatically when new data is loaded

requirements.text: Add CSV export functionality that exports all filtered User Assessment Data to a downloadable CSV file with all visible columns

quotes: Basic CSV export functionality for assessment data

acceptanceCriteria: Export button is clearly visible near the data table
CSV includes all table columns (Name, Date, Total Score, Section Scores, Contact Info)
Exports currently filtered/sorted data, not just current page
CSV file is named with timestamp (e.g., abl-assessments-2024-01-15.csv)
Download triggers immediately on button click
Shows loading state during export generation

requirements.text: Add backend query function getAllWellnessReports() in main.mo that returns all stored wellness reports with user basic info, timestamps, and calculated scores
acceptanceCriteria: Query function returns array of all wellness reports
Each report includes user name, WhatsApp number, email, assessment date
Includes total score and all four section scores
Function is callable by authenticated admin users
Returns empty array if no reports exist

requirements.text: Update AdminDashboardPage.tsx to replace placeholder content with the new User Assessment Data Table, Quick Stats Cards, and Export functionality components
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays Quick Stats Cards at the top
User Assessment Data Table is prominently displayed below stats
Export button is accessible near the table
Page maintains existing navigation header
Loading state shown while fetching assessment data
Error handling displays user-friendly message if data fetch fails

requirements.text: Create React Query hook useAdminAssessments in useQueries.ts for fetching all wellness reports data with automatic refetching and caching
acceptanceCriteria: Hook calls backend getAllWellnessReports() query function
Returns loading, error, and data states
Implements appropriate staleTime and cacheTime for dashboard data
Automatically refetches on window focus
Works seamlessly with existing Internet Identity authentication

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not edit shadcn UI components in frontend/src/components/ui
All backend logic must remain in the single main.mo actor file
Use existing score threshold constants from frontend/src/config/constants.ts for Alert status determination
Maintain existing bilingual support pattern (English/Hindi) where applicable in UI labels
nonGoals: Do not implement Phase 2 features (analytics graphs, PDF report generation, individual user detail view)
Do not implement Phase 3 features (user management, system configuration panel)
Do not add real-time data updates or WebSocket connections
Do not implement user authentication beyond existing Internet Identity integration
Do not modify the assessment flow or wellness report generation logic
